title: Architecture
description: The Architect Reviewer's structured output for a feature, persisted as features/<F>/architecture.json (the machine-checkable companion to architecture.md). NFRs live HERE, not on the spec-author-owned, spec-gated feature-spec.json/story.json: the architect proposes them and the HIL (Product Owner) accepts or modifies them at Gate 2. Moving NFRs off feature-spec.json resolves the spec-gate integrity drift (FEIP-7508): the architect annotating feature-spec.json after the spec gate hashed it tripped verify-gate-integrity.

nfrs.description: Non-functional requirements proposed by the architect, adjudicated by the HIL at Gate 2. An empty array is valid (a feature may have no NFRs), but every entry that exists must be HIL-considered, not unconsidered.

applies_to.description: Feature or story id this NFR scopes to. Omit for feature-wide NFRs.

hil_status.description: Architect proposes; the HIL accepts/modifies/rejects at Gate 2.
